title: Content Marketing Associate
description: Boston Consulting Group is seeking a Content Marketing Associate to support client and corporate marketing initiatives from our Nashville office. You'll develop thought leadership content, case studies, and marketing materials that showcase BCG's expertise. This onsite role offers exposure to world-class consulting and marketing excellence.
responsibilities: Develop compelling content including blog posts, case studies, and whitepapers showcasing BCG expertise
Conduct research on industry trends and competitive landscape; synthesize insights into marketing narratives
Collaborate with consultants and clients to understand and articulate complex solutions for audiences
Manage content calendars and ensure consistent messaging across marketing channels
Measure content performance; recommend optimization based on engagement metrics and feedback

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, Journalism, or related field
